title: Book a routine new-patient appointment

persona.name: Margaret Chen
persona.demeanor: polite, slightly anxious first-time caller who hasn't seen a doctor in years

facts.reason: persistent lower back pain for 3 weeks, worse in the morning

objective: Schedule a new-patient appointment for lower back pain within the next 2 weeks, on a weekday morning.
probes: Verify the agent collects insurance info correctly
Check if the agent asks about the nature of the visit or just books blindly
